non_promotion_statement: Pass 0068 ranks hypotheses and executable experiment designs. It does not prove market adoption, product completion, unique competitor absence, scientific discovery, or new natural laws.

source_anchors.label: OpenTelemetry
source_anchors.summary: Vendor-neutral telemetry standard with traces, metrics, logs, and baggage.

source_anchors.label: OpenLineage
source_anchors.summary: Open standard for data lineage collection and analysis.

source_anchors.label: RO-Crate
source_anchors.summary: Research object packaging model for data, software, workflows, and provenance.

source_anchors.label: Software Heritage
source_anchors.summary: Archive and reference infrastructure for source code.

source_anchors.label: MLflow
source_anchors.summary: ML lifecycle platform for experiment tracking and model management.

source_anchors.label: Weights & Biases
source_anchors.summary: AI developer platform with experiments, models, and agent/application tooling.

source_anchors.label: Langfuse
source_anchors.summary: LLM engineering platform for tracing, evals, prompt management, and metrics.

source_anchors.label: LangSmith
source_anchors.summary: LLM application observability and evaluation tooling.

source_anchors.label: Nextflow
source_anchors.summary: Scalable and reproducible scientific workflow engine.

source_anchors.label: Snakemake
source_anchors.summary: Reproducible and scalable workflow management system.

source_anchors.label: MLIR
source_anchors.summary: Compiler infrastructure for reusable and extensible compiler construction.

source_anchors.label: Triton
source_anchors.summary: GPU programming and compiler stack for custom kernels.

source_anchors.label: OpenColorIO
source_anchors.summary: Color management solution for motion picture production.

source_anchors.label: ACES
source_anchors.summary: Industry color-management knowledge base and ecosystem.

source_anchors.label: Spack
source_anchors.summary: Package manager for reproducible HPC software stacks.

source_anchors.label: NIST AI RMF
source_anchors.summary: AI risk-management framework anchor for governance-facing receipts.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Run buyer-review demos with incumbent export adapters.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: No buyer can name a must-have audit gap.
steelman_objections.objection: Buyers may prefer incumbent dashboards over proof packets.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Limit each pass to one replayable adapter and one negative fixture.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: Adapters require raw private payloads to replay.
steelman_objections.objection: A megatool can become integration debt.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Tie compiler work to measured physics/color/finance receipts.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: No runtime receipt beats incumbent reproducibility workflows.
steelman_objections.objection: BuildLang/buildc could overfit to language ambition before proof demand is validated.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Require source, proof, experiment, and verifier layers.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: A packet cannot reject false or overstated claims.
steelman_objections.objection: Research proof packets can become polished summaries, not discovery tools.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Promote pass 0067 repair into roster/scoring tests.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: Broad Telos prompts still escalate after route fixtures are added.
steelman_objections.objection: Forum routing may depend on prompt phrasing.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Measure minimal sufficient receipt sets per buyer.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: Replay confidence does not increase after adding receipts.
steelman_objections.objection: Too many receipts can slow operators.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Treat them as ingestion surfaces, not enemies.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: A Telos packet cannot add claim verification or action authority beyond imports.
steelman_objections.objection: OpenTelemetry, RO-Crate, OpenLineage, MLflow, and W&B already cover pieces.

steelman_objections.counter_experiment: Keep unsupported_claim_count at zero and publish falsifiers first.
steelman_objections.kill_criterion: Any artifact promotes market uniqueness or scientific discovery without evidence.

tool_rows.falsifier: Telos row fails if a receipt cannot be replayed, a negative fixture is absent, or the market wedge remains untestable.
tool_rows.integration_target: multi-receipt join and product packet exporter
tool_rows.market_wedge_hypothesis: platform buyers need proof packet operating system spine when local proof is not enough for audit, replay, or collaboration.
tool_rows.success_metric: Telos improves a cross-tool proof packet without increasing unsupported_claim_count above 0.
